name: Strix AI Penetration Testing Agent
description: An AI-powered penetration testing agent that autonomously identifies, analyzes, and exploits security vulnerabilities.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Your Gemini API Key to power the LLM.

GEMINI_PROJECT_NAME.description: Your GCP Project Name for Gemini (e.g., projects/1234567890).

GEMINI_PROJECT_NUMBER.description: Your GCP Project Number for Gemini.

STRIX_SANDBOX_MODE.description: Run Strix in Sandbox Mode to avoid Docker socket requirements.
